bicgstab_device_probe.conclusion: The short-recurrence bicgstab-jax route reduced peak host RSS relative to full-restart device FGMRES, but it diverged on the scale-0.60 QI hard seed and output was correctly refused. Keep it opt-in until the preconditioner or Krylov formulation is stabilized.

device_global_qr_fgmres_probe.conclusion: The device global-coupling correction now uses a rank-revealed QR coarse solve and remains compatible with the device-resident assembled operator. On the scale-0.60 QI hard seed it built successfully, but FGMRES still timed out at the 540 s gate and peak host RSS remained high, so this is better coarse-solve infrastructure but not a promoted hard-seed fix.

device_global_qr_identity_probe_coarse_p.conclusion: Changing the device global-coupling setup to an identity/raw physics-load smoother bounded the coarse setup and reached the Krylov solve start, but the scale-0.60 QI hard seed still timed out before convergence. Probe-coarse only reduced the seed residual from 3.021487e-05 to 3.019236e-05, so this is a setup/runtime improvement and negative evidence for promotion.

device_operator_probe.conclusion: The device-resident assembled operator path works and removes the host SciPy matvec loop, but the current full-restart device FGMRES run timed out after 540 s and peaked near 40 GB RSS. Next QI work should reuse this operator with lower-memory restarted/short-recurrence Krylov or a stronger residual-reducing preconditioner.

device_row_col_cap256_cycle_jit_probe.conclusion: Increasing the JAX x-block sparse factor row cap from 64 to 256 did not improve the hard-seed residual. The bottleneck is not merely the 64-entry triangular-factor padding cap when the path still uses ILU blocks.

evidence_note: Bounded QI seed-robustness execution summary generated from the reusable runner manifest gate. Passing artifacts provide measured evidence at their recorded resolution; failed or timed-out artifacts are blocker evidence and must not be used for production promotion. Added 2026-05-14 cycle-JIT, recycled cycle-JIT, rank-gated moment-Schur, and explicit-side probe evidence. The 2026-05-14 row/column equilibration and exact-x-block-LU probes show that the device operator path is stable and bounded for ILU-scaled solves, but QI hard-seed closure requires a compact exact/block-Schur representation or a genuinely stronger coarse operator; row scaling, two-sided scaling, larger ILU padding, and naive padded exact LU are rejected as production fixes. A compact-CSR exact-xblock GPU probe was also implemented and measured: it built the exact per-x LU factors without padded row truncation (2.76 GB estimated factor arrays, 17.2 GB peak RSS) but timed out before a solver trace, so compact storage alone is rejected as the QI GPU closure algorithm.

fgmres_restart20_cycle_sync_device_probe.conclusion: Cycle-boundary synchronization verified the FGMRES memory knob and preserved the device-operator path, but it did not lower peak hard-seed RSS or converge before the 540 s gate. The memory ceiling is dominated by the algorithmic FGMRES/basis/preconditioner footprint, not merely queued cross-cycle work.

fgmres_restart20_device_probe.conclusion: Restart-20 device FGMRES kept Krylov matvecs on the assembled device operator, but timed out at the 540 s gate and increased host RSS relative to the full-restart probe. It is not a promotable QI hard-seed path; the next algorithmic step must reduce host-side Krylov basis retention or use a stronger/short-recurrence method that actually reduces residuals.

tfqmr_device_probe.conclusion: The transpose-free QMR route preserved the device-resident assembled-operator path and kept the short-recurrence memory footprint near the BiCGStab probe, but it diverged on the scale-0.60 QI hard seed and output was correctly refused. TFQMR is therefore an opt-in diagnostic path, not a production replacement.

tfqmr_replacement20_device_probe.conclusion: True-residual replacement every 20 TFQMR iterations made the divergent short-recurrence path fail safely in about half the wall time, but the residual still exploded to the same scale as BiCGStab/TFQMR without replacement. This closes TFQMR residual replacement as a guardrail, not as the QI hard-seed replacement solver.
